heading: Preemption
label: 7974 Preemption
text: Nothing in this subpart is intended to preempt any provision of law of a State or political subdivision of a State that is more restrictive than a provision of this subpart.11See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis subpart, referred to in text, was in the original “this part”, and was translated as reading “this subpart”, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. redesignated part C of title IV of as subpart 5 of part F of title VIII of , which is classified to this subpart.Pub. L. 114–95Pub. L. 89–10Pub. L. 89–10
